title: 2-Stroke Haze IPA
description: Don't you just love the smell of a two stroke engine? It usually means a good day spent in the woods or yard getting stuff done! 2-Stroke Haze is a juicy + hazy + citrusy IPA featuring citra, mosaic, & amarillo hops.

title: 4LO PALE ALE
description: All of the flavor none of the "I should have gone home energy." Our low alcohol pale ale brings a pop of real pineapple for a little tropical lift wihout the heavy buzz. A brew that's perfect for trails, tailgates, & everything in between.

title: 100LL • 2026 Barrel Aged Stout
description: The 2026 version of 100LL is an imperial stout aged 36 months in a single barrel of Rabbit Hole Rye.
notes: Limited Release bottles $12 at the taproom. No Crowler or Growler fills.

title: Amber Lager
description: A variety of different malts offer up layers of delicate toasty caramel sweetness rounding out with a crisp lager finish.

title: Blood Orange Blonde
description: Blood Orange Blonde Ale is highlighted with real blood orange puree. Brewed with williamette hops to add a spicy fruity aroma. Subtle and easy drinkin'

title: Cadillac Couch Mexican Lager
description: Cadillac Couch is a refreshing lager that is light, crisp, & perfect for any occasion. It is brewed with real lime puree and we serve it with a lime wedge for extra swank.

title: Dark Lager
description: Our Dark Lager is malty sweet with smooth dark roasty notes and a light body.

title: Key Lime Sour Ale
description: Key Lime Sour is a rollercoaster of awesome for your tastebuds. Brewed with real limes and vanilla. The sweet/ tart lime flavors roll into a subtle Citra hop twist, rounding out with a smooth vanilla finish.

title: Nelson Science Hazy Pale Ale
description: Complex, juicy, and bursting with tropical New Zealand hops. Soft mouthfeel, vibrant aroma, & just the right amount of haze to keep things interesting. Made for sunshine, good company, and easy drinking.

title: Ninja Juice IPA
description: Unleash your inner beast with this tropical + juicy IPA. Mosaic & Citra hops will kick your taste buds into high gear & leave you begging for more. Beware of potential extra stealthy abilities.

title: Premium Craft Lager
description: Premium ingredients for a premium craft lager.

title: Petal & Thorn Blackberry Sour
description: The girls of Sawyer (with some help ;) brewed up Petal & Thorn with this years Pink Boots hop blend. Blackberry tarness and enough floral softness to keep you coming back for another sip. She's sweet, she's sharp, & she bites back.

title: PILS
description: Bright, golden, & refreshingly crisp. Our German-style pilsner is brewed with light malt & noble hops for that signature snappy finish. Pours clear with a beautiful floral aroma. Prost to simplicity done right.

title: Prime Real Estate West Coast IPA
description: What's your prime real estate? McMansion? Cozy cabin? Around here it seems to be all of the above, so it seems fitting to name a beer about it. Bright & clean with complex stone fruit citrus zest. Featuring Citra, Simcoe, Mosaic, & Nectaron hops.

title: Raspberry Blonde
description: Raspberry Blonde is brewed with real raspberries. A subtlty sweet easy drinkin' treat.

title: Smoldering Scotch Ale
description: A roasty, and slightly sweet malty treat. Hints of caramel and maple will make this an instant favorite.

title: Strawberry Whip Sour Ale
description: This dreamy dessert in a glass is brewed with real decacent strawberries, a hint of sour with the perfect balance of real vanilla.
